blended.narrative: Winter Park is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,967 ft. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 13.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 38".
